page 29 of the Tables you will get the ascendants for Bombay in
signs, degrees and minutes for all hours within intervals of every
4 minutes. Under 8 h. and against 24 minutes you will find
6^10-46'. This shows that the ascendant is Eibra or Tula and
the degree ascending is the 11th, Now you will have to work
out the fraction of minutes of arc corresponding to the 9 seconds
you see in the S. T. For 8 h. 28 m. of S. T. the figure for the
ascendant is 6S-110-41 . This shows that for a difference of
four minutes in the S. T. the increase in the ascendant is 55'
only. So for I minute it would be '/OTtaateS, If for I minute
